final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书 cover image for a user-generated-content creator account.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" (authentic user-generated content) aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s-2020s Chinese social media KOL content, 小红书 lifestyle creator grid layouts, casual smartphone photography culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9-grid (九宫格) layout format
Subject: must feature the DJI Pocket 4 product as the central focus
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, relatable atmosphere — exact mood is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" as the central title text, with cute and differentiated typography
Constraints: must be 小红书 cover image format (vertical), 9-grid layout structure preserved
Avoid:
